item.title: Update CHANGELOG.md with v0.3.3 release notes
item.intent: Document all changes since v0.3.2 in CHANGELOG.md so the version file and changelog are in sync
steps: Review git log from v0.3.2 tag to HEAD to identify all changes
Write a v0.3.3 section in CHANGELOG.md following the existing format
Verify VERSION file matches the new CHANGELOG entry
acceptanceCriteria: All commits since v0.3.2 are represented in the changelog
